description: Style Note Have a blast on the field, or when you're out on an everyday jog, with these comfortable canvas from gas. These shoes come with cool urban styling and a comfortable structure, and are worth adding to your wardrobe as they're also a perfect casual option when teamed with jeans and tees. Product DetailsOlive green canvas with central lace-ups, overlays and stitched detailing A padded tongue and inner Tough rubber outsole Thick TPU outsole with herringbone grooves Material and Care Canvas and suede Do not store in direct sunlight Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
